channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Who Is Stepping in for Savannah Guthrie on the “Today” Show? What to Know About the Hosting Changes amid Nancy Guthrie's Disappearance
item.description: Savannah Guthrie has been absent from the 'Today' show amid the search for her mother, who was last seen on Jan. 31

item.title: “Big Brother”'s Rachel Reilly and Brendon Villegas Hope to Show Grandkids 'Grandma and Grandpa Met on Reality TV' (Exclusive)
item.description: The couple met on season 12 of the CBS competition show in 2010 and now share two children

item.title: Kelly Clarkson’s Talk Show Is Ending, but You Can Still Shop Wayfair Pieces Inspired by Her Set for Up to 83% Off
item.description: Shop patterned pillows, bold area rugs, and velvet sofas from $20

item.title: “The Bachelor's ”Sean Lowe and Catherine Giudici Have One Piece of Advice for Anyone Looking for Love on Reality TV (Exclusive)
item.description: The couple met during season 17 of 'The Bachelor' and remain one of the long-lasting pairs to come out of the franchise

item.title: Princess Margaret's Death, 24 Years Later: What to Know About Queen Elizabeth's Sister's Final Moments
item.description: Princess Margaret faced health problems leading up to her death on Feb. 9, 2002

item.title: Epstein Files Include Provocative Videos, DOJ Says No Crimes on Camera

item.title: Bad Bunny Dancer Pulls Back Curtain On Super Bowl Takeover
